query:
-- Update Old Testament Survey with sample intro video
UPDATE courses 
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ALsluAKBZ-c'
WHERE code = 'DIV101';

-- Update New Testament Survey with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Q0BrP8bqj0c'
WHERE code = 'DIV102';

-- Update Systematic Theology with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oNNZO9i1Gjc'
WHERE code = 'DIV103';

-- Update Biblical Hermeneutics with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8b3JHnffPpY'
WHERE code = 'DIV104';

-- Update Christian Apologetics with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=YbjFPxRGjFc'
WHERE code = 'DIV105';

-- Update Church History with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C_3jFFCzFCg'
WHERE code = 'DIV106';

-- Update Christian Ethics with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Rm2wShHJ2iA'
WHERE code = 'DIV107';

-- Update Discipleship with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vdWn1II0f5A'
WHERE code = 'DIV108';

-- Update Prayer and Intercession with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yk_WJSiW24c'
WHERE code = 'DIV109';

-- Update Christian Leadership with sample intro video
UPDATE courses
SET introVideoUrl = 'https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=69rvNfqeqvM'
WHERE code = 'DIV110';
